programme.desc: When Quinten misses out on a promotion at the Apple Store for being too soft, George and Oscar take him to the swap meet to teach him how to get hard; a leopard-print-loving Rosie finds out that Mayan thinks she's tacky.

programme.title: Lopez vs Lopez S2
programme.desc: The stress of Mayan and Quinten's new jobs leads to an unexpected amount of conflict... and pizza; George and Rosie find a way to benefit from the mayhem.

programme.title: Special Forces: World's Toughest Test S3
programme.desc: Challenges include treading water as a group and bungee jumping off a 12-story viaduct.

programme.title: Family Feud

programme.desc: George joins a meditation group led by Carlos the Curandero, a spiritual healer whose mantra is "let it go," however, Mayan worries her dad is letting go of too much, including their living room furniture; a burnout threatens to move next door.

programme.desc: As part of Alcoholics Anonymous, George makes amends with everyone except Oscar, who seeks an apology at a football game, but a run-in with Marshawn Lynch fumbles the plan; Mayan and Quinten try to spark Rosie's love life but end up getting burned.

programme.title: Bel-Air S2
programme.desc: Will strives to be fully independent from the Banks family after his fallout with Lou. Ashley celebrates her 13th birthday.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: It’s Restaurant Wars and this season Padma takes all the limitations off the table as the chefs can make as much food as they want and shop wherever they choose. The two winning chefs from last week’s concept challenge are given 48 hours to pick their teams and make the restaurants they pitched come to life.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When all the Westley Kids but Philly Phil get invited to a popular kid's party Philly Phil becomes determined to figure out exactly what it is about popular kid behavior that he doesn't grasp. The data he compiles on the subject he then uses to build a robot he calls BROC (Big Robot on Campus) which he endows with all the sure-fire popularity attributes he can think of thus making it possible for Philly Phil to ride into popularity on BROC's coattails. Surprisingly Philly Phil's plan seems to work... that is until things start backfiring when BROC begins treating Philly Phil as a social liability and starts scoring popularity points at Philly Phil's expense.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: Superman returns after five years in space to find Lois engaged and Lex Luthor with a sinister plan that will endanger America.

programme.title: Ben 10 S1
programme.desc: Ben's holiday to Portland is cut short when he discovers an 11th alien while battling a Dr. Animo Mega-Creature and damages his Omnitrix in a fight.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: While on a visit to Cape Canaveral, the Tennyson Trio attends the inaugural launch of an experimental space plane. When Vilgax commandeers the ship, Ben must stop him from weaponising the shuttle.

programme.title: Chowder S1

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: The chefs head to the mountains, a few hours outside of Los Angeles to go to Summer Camp where they are challenged to an outdoor grilling Quickfire for Padma and “Top Chef” Kentucky winner Kelsey Barnard Clark. Before the sun rises, the chefs get to work on an upscale brunch buffet for 200 moms vacationing at the camp using a very limited stock pantry. It’ll take more than s’mores and a round of kumbayas to impress the moms, the judges Tom, Padma and Gail, and guest judge “Top Chef” Charleston Winner Brooke Williamson.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: We follow Auckland Zoo’s bird team into the wilds of the Coromandel Ranges as they help to save native kiwi populations, It’s a feeding frenzy for the Tasmanian devils and the elephant team faces their biggest challenge yet.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, there's shocking news for the elephant team, the vets are concerned about one of their rescued Little penguins, and we find out how it really does take a community to feed the Zoo.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, Little penguin Snapper returns to the colony but will he be accepted? The vet team prepare to treat Samantran tiger Sali, and the Zoo helps to save an endangered native species at risk.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Mike Davidson embeds with the team of one of the most extreme, avalanche-prone mountain ski mountains in the world - Snowbird. They battle to keep the steep and deep slopes safe with shovels, snowcats and even a WWII Howitzer cannon.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Mike Davidson goes to the biggest automated package sorting facility in the world - UPS Worldport in Louisville, Kentucky. Two million packages go through here every day, and it's up to the hardhat heroes behind the scenes to make it all happen.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, Mike Davidson is on streets, in tunnels, on tracks and in trolley restoration garages - working shoulder-to-shoulder with the team that keeps one of America's largest and oldest mass transit systems running smoothly and on time.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Study how to divide whole numbers up to 1000 including money and unit fractions. Learn more about straight and curved lines, flat and curved surfaces, and basic shapes and continuous patterns using two attributes.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Discover what are word clines, synonyms, and antonyms. Identify major points and key themes in a story, and the difference between what is made-up and real in texts.

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan

programme.title: Grade 3 Filipino
programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang tambalang salita, pandiwa, pang-abay, at pang-ukol. Alamin kung paano magbigay ng sariling ideya, hinuha, pangunahin at sumusuportang kaisipan, tungkol sa kuwentong napakinggan.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Identify which fractions are proper and improper, similar and dissimilar and equivalent. Learn more about lines and symmetrical designs, continuous and repeating patterns, and mathematical sentences involving multiplication and division of whole numbers.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Study what are homonyms, homographs, and hyponyms. Know more about the elements of a story, how to write it, and how to compare and contrast its information, alongside learning about words, phrases, and sentences with long vowels.

programme.title: Grade 3 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Unawain at pahalagahan ang pagkakakilanlang kultural ng kinabibilangang rehiyon.

programme.title: Grade 3 Science
programme.desc: Discover how objects perform motion, and learn about the source of light, sound, heat and electricity, along with their uses.

programme.title: Grade 5 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin ang wastong pagamit ng mga pang-abay, pang-uri, pang-angkop, pangatnig, salitang naglalarawan. Aralin kung paano magsulat ng pangungusap, talata, at balita, at kung paano magsuri ng mga kuwento at mga pahayag.

programme.title: Grade 5 Math
programme.desc: Discover what are percents, polygons, circles, solid figures, sequences, time, circumference, and how to solve simple equations.

programme.title: Grade 5 English
programme.desc: Differentiate the various text-types and know how to summarize them, as well as how to make a stand and provide evidences supporting opinions or facts.

programme.title: Grade 5 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa mga pagbabago sa lipunan ng sinaunang Pilipino kabilang ang pagpupunyagi ng ilang pangkat na mapanatili ang kalayaan sa Kolonyalismong Espanyol at ang impluwensya nito sa kasalukuyan.

programme.title: Grade 5 Science
programme.desc: Learn more about motion in terms of distance and time, alongside how objects and people interact and are affected by light, sound, and heat, and electricity. Discover the relationship of electricity and magnetism in electromagnets, and what simple DC circuits are.

programme.title: Grade 8 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin kung paano magsuri at maghambing ng iba't ibang uri ng panitikan, kung ano ang mga estratehiya sa pagkuha ng impormasyon, paano wastong gamitin ang impormal na komunikasyon, at ang angkop na ekspresyon sa pagbabahagi ng ideya o opinyon tungkol sa mga tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Grade 8 Math
programme.desc: Identify the key concepts of axiomatic structure of geometry and triangle congruence.

programme.title: Grade 8 English
programme.desc: Examine what are biases, propagandas, parallelism, and cohesive devices in different types of speech.

programme.title: Grade 8 Araling Panlipunan

programme.title: Grade 8 Science
programme.desc: Learn more about the particle nature of matter as a basis for explaining properties, physical changes, and structure of substances and mixtures. programme.title: Long Weekends - EP 6
programme.desc: We're back with a quick getaway to Penang, Malaysia this time! Watch to find out all the yummy food spots we uncovered in Penang, and see if Sonia manages to hold on for her dear life on the donut boat ride while singing her favourite song!!

programme.title: Scene City: Teeter
programme.desc: Pragmatic Hui Min and idealistic Pax are two of the unlikeliest lovers that have ever existed. So unlikely, in fact, that they're getting divorced. On this night, she's back at their flat with divorce papers, to put an end to a fairytale romance that has mutated into a horror story.

programme.title: Quantum Leap S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Set 30 years after Dr. Sam Beckett stepped into the Quantum Leap accelerator and vanished, follows a new team that must restart the project hoping to understand the mysteries behind the machine and its creator.

programme.title: Watson S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Watson confronts a traumatic event from his Army days that still weighs heavily on him when his Army veteran friend's wife reaches out begging for help when her husband is seemingly having a psychotic breakdown. Meanwhile, Shinwell is asked for one last favor by Moriarty.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights - EP 62

programme.title: White Cat Legend - EP 10 大理寺少卿游
programme.desc: The story is set in the divine capital under the rule of the Empress. During a grand night banquet at the Tang Palace, Li Bing, who is favored by the Empress, is appointed as the Vice Minister of the Ministry of Justice. In the Ministry of Justice, Chen Shi, Wang Qi, Alibaba, Cui Bei, and Sun Bao, under the leadership of the new Vice Minister, the White Cat Li Bing, work together to clear the layers of mystery surrounding the divine capital.

programme.title: Travel with Mommy - EP 7 带阿母去旅行
programme.desc: Top Hosts Jason Yeoh & Jack Lim create priceless mother-son memories, on a journey of love to check off their moms' travel wish lists. Join them in HK, Malaysia & Singapore on customised vacations.

programme.title: The Ultimatum - EP 27 双子星
programme.desc: Zheng Wen Yu was pregnant when she was taken advantage of by her boss Ye Song Nian, the CEO of Phoenix Corporation. Both Wen Yu and Song Nian's wife gave birth to daughters in the same hospital. As fate will have it, the hospital made a mistake and swapped the babies. Because Wen Yu's daughter was diagnosed with congenital heart disease, she kept silent about the mistake so that her daughter can receive the best medical care with Song Nian's wealth.

programme.title: The Ultimatum - EP 28 双子星
programme.desc: Zheng Wen Yu was pregnant when she was taken advantage of by her boss Ye Song Nian, the CEO of Phoenix Corporation. Both Wen Yu and Song Nian's wife gave birth to daughters in the same hospital. As fate will have it, the hospital made a mistake and swapped the babies. Because Wen Yu's daughter was diagnosed with congenital heart disease, she kept silent about the mistake so that her daughter can receive the best medical care with Song Nian's wealth.

programme.title: Golden City - EP 497 多情城市
programme.desc: This drama is set in the Jiufen area from the 1960s to the 1970s. It tells the story of how three brothers conquered the world with their bare hands. Through the love story of the previous generation, it connects the common emotions between the two generations depicting the memories and in-depth exploration of the differences in values between them.

programme.title: Golden City - EP 498 多情城市

programme.title: Forbidding No More - EP 4 极境之旅
programme.desc: Iran, Cuba or North Korea are not exactly the most accessible countries. In fact most would balk at the idea of holidaying there. Stringent visa requirements and hard travel conditions are but some factors. But are they really inaccessible? "Forbidding No More" takes us to these countries to explore what culture and attractions these locations have to offer.

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Healing Heroes - EP 129 医生不是神
programme.desc: Patients entrust their health and lives to doctors, but doctors are human too, how do they learn to shoulder the weight of these lives? programme.title: Lemonade
programme.desc: Mara, a young Romanian mother, is a caretaker in the US on a temporary visa. Life seemed perfect after she got married and brought her son over. However, she faces abuses of power from the officer in her green card process, who seeks to exploit her plight.

programme.title: Malai Kofta
programme.desc: A young aspiring chef becomes distant to his family ever since he went to study abroad. Coming back home, he makes a lot of reckless decisions which unexpectedly bring him closer to his family.

programme.title: Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: Yusuf’s best friend, Memo falls gravely ill. Isolated in their boarding school located in the snowy mountains, tensions run high as Yusuf’s calls for help for Memo becomes increasingly difficult in the face of an authoritarian and bureaucratic system.

programme.title: Irreplaceable
programme.desc: Jean-Pierre Werner, a revered and devoted country doctor, discovers that he is suffering from an inoperable tumor. As a doctor from the city arrives to help him with his practice, Werner is troubled by the thought that he is no longer irreplaceable.

programme.title: A Minute's Silence
programme.desc: In a small Baltic town, 18-year-old Christian and his teacher Stella fall for one another and begin a secret affair. However, the intensity of their feelings soon overwhelm them. When tragedy befalls Stella, Christian is forced to confront his first love.

programme.title: So Far, So Close
programme.desc: Junho is a lively, sociable bar owner who enjoys being surrounded by people, yet deep inside carries a delicate yearning for the lover he lost ten years ago. Whenever he encounters someone who resembles her, he can’t help but stare, captivated by memory.

programme.title: Karakol
programme.desc: After recently losing her father, Clara discovers a passport, foreign bills and letters while going through his things. Suspecting that he is living a secret life, she embarks on a trip to Karakil, a lake in Tajikistan, to find out the truth.

programme.title: La La La at Rock Bottom
programme.desc: After his release from prison, Shigeo loses his memory in a brutal attack. Taken in by Kasumi, he becomes the lead singer of a band and lives a new life- until memories of his dark past begin to return.

programme.title: The Grump: In Search Of An Escort
programme.desc: The Grump, a stubborn old Finnish farmer, goes on a quest to find a replacement for his beloved second-hand car. He goes to Germany to do so, but ends up settling accounts with his past.

programme.title: Virgin Mountain
programme.desc: Fusi is in his forties and yet to find courage to enter the adult world. He sleepwalks through everyday life, where routine is key. Unexpected events force him to make drastic decisions.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In Calcutta
programme.desc: Having just lost her daughter and disillusioned with her marriage, Ela decides to start an independent life of her own. Unable to secure a housing loan, she uses her boss, the owner of a ponzi scheme, to get what she wants.

programme.title: Lemonade
programme.desc: Mara, a young Romanian mother, is a caretaker in the US on a temporary visa. Life seemed perfect after she got married and brought her son over. However, she faces abuses of power from the officer in her green card process, who seeks to exploit her plight.

programme.title: Running To The Sky

programme.title: Murders in Porquerolles
programme.desc: The lifeless body of a painter is found on a beach in Porquerolles. Her body at the foot of the cliff evokes the Lycastre, the famous dragon from the legend that gave the bay its name. A rigid prosecutor and a whimsical policewoman team up to investigate.

programme.title: Playmaker

programme.title: Pari

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In Calcutta
programme.desc: Having just lost her daughter and disillusioned with her marriage, Ela decides to start an independent life of her own. Unable to secure a housing loan, she uses her boss, the owner of a ponzi scheme, to get what she wants.

programme.title: Karakol
programme.desc: After recently losing her father, Clara discovers a passport, foreign bills and letters while going through his things. Suspecting that he is living a secret life, she embarks on a trip to Karakil, a lake in Tajikistan, to find out the truth.

programme.title: The Grump: In Search Of An Escort
programme.desc: The Grump, a stubborn old Finnish farmer, goes on a quest to find a replacement for his beloved second-hand car. He goes to Germany to do so, but ends up settling accounts with his past.

programme.title: Running To The Sky
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Jekshen is an exceptional runner living in a beautiful mountain village in Kyrgyzstan. Struggling to live with his divorced alcoholic father, Jeksen sees an upcoming big race as an opportunity to change his life for the better.

programme.title: Suro
programme.desc: A young, vulnerable couple inherits a cork-harvesting farm in rural Catalonia. As newly fledged landowners, they dream of building a fair and sustainable life, only to find their ideals clash head-on with their dire need to make money.

programme.title: Murders in Porquerolles
programme.desc: The lifeless body of a painter is found on a beach in Porquerolles. Her body at the foot of the cliff evokes the Lycastre, the famous dragon from the legend that gave the bay its name. A rigid prosecutor and a whimsical policewoman team up to investigate.

programme.title: Hunting Season
programme.desc: Enersto, a hunting guide in Patagonia, is left to take care of his teenage son he hasn’t seen for years. An intense father-son relationship is played out amidst the hostility of nature.

programme.title: Playmaker
programme.desc: A former footballer and jailbird, Ivo is no longer interested in football. That is until he meets Lukas, a talented young player, and decides to help him pursue a professional career. But his criminal past soon catches up with him.

programme.title: The Second
programme.desc: An author's success following the release of her celebrated erotic memoir is threatened when her best friend and muse reveals the truth behind the memoir's provenance, igniting an incendiary tale of sex, lies and betrayal.

programme.title: Pari
programme.desc: Pari, an Iranian mother, goes to Athens with her husband to meet their son studying abroad. When their son is nowhere to be seen, she embarks on a journey in the unfamiliar city where she will uncover more than just her son’s whereabouts.

programme.title: To Kill A Mongolian Horse
programme.desc: Saina, a herdsman by day and horseback performer by night, clings to his heritage on the wintry steppes of Inner Mongolia, as he’s forced to confront the crumbling of the world he once knew.

programme.title: Murders in Pont-Aven
programme.desc: The bodies of two gallery owners are found. These murders are reminiscent of the death of Suzanne, a painter, 20 years ago. The investigation is led by Marion, Suzanne's daughter, and by Antoine who was in charge of the investigations at the time.

programme.title: Roise & Frank
programme.desc: Recently widowed Róise is struggling with her grief following her husband's passing. However, when a stray dog starts to follow her around, she starts to believe that it might be the reincarnation of her husband.

programme.title: One Last Supper
programme.desc: A spirit-seeing daughter must race against time to save her mother’s spirit from turning into a Hungry Ghost by retracing her mother’s past life.

programme.title: Murder in Kermadec
programme.desc: A man is found dead at the foot of a cliff in a small quiet fishing village. Captain Breguet who wanted to leave the region will have to stay a little longer to solve this crime. She will find a mysterious man on her way and fight to protect her daughter.
